register.description: Fill in the details below to quickly create your knowledge workspace account.

register.title: Create a new account

email.label: Email
email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.max: Email must be no longer than 100 characters

username.label: Username
username.range: Username must be between 2 and 30 characters
